metadata.title: Groww Product Meeting - Q2 2026. Users reported slow app performance during market opening hours. New investors are confused about selecting mutual funds. Some users mentioned delays in withdrawal processing. Competitors like Zerodha offer advanced charts while Groww is preferred for simple UI. Team decided to improve onboarding, add better portfolio insights, and improve app speed.
